## Anomaly Detail — Every Issue Detected

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] DUPLICATE_EXPENSE — Rows 5 & 6
**Rows affected:** 5 (`Dinner at Marina Bites`, Dev, ₹3200) and 6 (`dinner - marina bites`, Dev, ₹3200)  
**Detection method:** Fuzzy duplicate — same date (08-02-2026), same payer (Dev), similar description (6-char prefix match), same amount  
**Suggested action:** Keep Row 5, skip Row 6  
**Action taken:** Row 6 SKIPPED

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] SETTLEMENT_AS_EXPENSE — Row 14
**Row affected:** 14 ("Rohan paid Aisha back", ₹5000)  
**Detection method:** Description matches pattern `/paid.*(back|aisha)/i`; notes contain "this is a settlement"  
**Suggested action:** Convert to Settlement record (fromUser: Rohan, toUser: Aisha)  
**Action taken:** CONVERTED TO SETTLEMENT

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] DUPLICATE_EXPENSE — Rows 24 & 25
**Rows affected:** 24 (`Dinner at Thalassa`, Aisha, ₹2400) and 25 (`Thalassa dinner`, Rohan, ₹2450)  
**Detection method:** Same date (11-03-2026), payer-adjacent, similar description prefix — notes on Row 25: "Aisha also logged this I think hers is wrong"  
**Suggested action:** Keep Row 24, skip Row 25  
**Action taken:** Row 25 SKIPPED

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] AMBIGUOUS_DATE — Row 34
**Row affected:** 34 (`Deep cleaning service`, Rohan, ₹2500, date: `04-05-2026`)  
**Detection method:** Notes contain "april" or "may" keywords and date ambiguity language  
**Notes:** "is this April 5 or May 4? format is a mess"  
**Suggested action:** User must confirm: April 5 (DD-MM format) or May 4 (MM-DD format)  
**Action taken:** KEPT as 04-05-2026 (user confirmed: April 5th, 2026)

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] MEMBERSHIP_CONFLICT — Row 36
**Row affected:** 36 (`Groceries BigBasket`, Priya, ₹2640, date: 02-04-2026)  
**Detection method:** Meera is in `split_with` but her `leftAt` is 2026-03-31 — she was not a member on 02-04-2026  
**Notes:** "oops Meera still in the group list"  
**Suggested action:** Remove Meera from split; redistribute equally among active members (Aisha, Rohan, Priya)  
**Action taken:** MODIFIED — Meera removed, split redistributed 3 ways

---

### 🔴 [HIGH] SETTLEMENT_AS_EXPENSE — Row 38
**Row affected:** 38 (`Sam deposit share`, Sam, ₹15000)  
**Detection method:** Notes say "Sam moving in! paid Aisha his deposit" — deposit payment, not shared expense  
**Suggested action:** Convert to Settlement (fromUser: Sam, toUser: Aisha)  
**Action taken:** CONVERTED TO SETTLEMENT

---

### 🟡 [MEDIUM] NON_INTEGER_AMOUNT — Row 10
**Row affected:** 10 (`Cylinder refill`, Rohan, `899.995` INR)  
**Detection method:** Amount has 3 decimal places (more than 2)  
**Suggested action:** Round to ₹900.00  
**Action taken:** MODIFIED — amount rounded to 900.00

---

### 🟡 [MEDIUM] UNKNOWN_PAYER — Row 11
**Row affected:** 11 (`Groceries DMart`, paid_by: `"Priya S"`)  
**Detection method:** "Priya S" not in known members list [Aisha, Rohan, Priya, Meera, Sam]  
**Suggested action:** Map to known member "Priya"  
**Action taken:** MODIFIED — mapped to Priya

---

### 🟡 [MEDIUM] MISSING_PAYER — Row 13
**Row affected:** 13 (`House cleaning supplies`, ₹780, no payer)  
**Notes:** "can't remember who paid"  
**Detection method:** `paid_by` column is empty  
**Suggested action:** Assign payer or skip  
**Action taken:** MODIFIED — assigned to Aisha (group decided)

---

### 🟡 [MEDIUM] PERCENTAGE_SUM_ERROR — Row 15
**Row affected:** 15 (`Pizza Friday`, Aisha, ₹1440)  
**split_details:** `Aisha 30%; Rohan 30%; Priya 30%; Meera 20%` — sums to **110%**  
**Detection method:** Sum of percentages deviates from 100% by more than 0.5%  
**Suggested action:** Normalise: each × (100/110). Aisha 27.27%, Rohan 27.27%, Priya 27.27%, Meera 18.18%  
**Action taken:** MODIFIED — percentages normalised

---

### 🟡 [MEDIUM] NEGATIVE_AMOUNT — Row 26
**Row affected:** 26 (`Parasailing refund`, Dev, `-$30 USD`)  
**Detection method:** Amount < 0  
**Suggested action:** Import as `isRefund: true`  
**Action taken:** KEPT as refund — imported with isRefund=true, amount stored as 30

### 🟢 [LOW] SPLIT_TYPE_CONTRADICTION — Row 42
**Row affected:** 42 (`Furniture for common room`, Aisha, ₹12000)  
**split_type:** `equal` but `split_details` contains `Aisha 1; Rohan 1; Priya 1; Sam 1`  
**Detection method:** split_type = "equal" but split_details are non-empty  
**Note:** Notes say "split_type says equal but someone added shares anyway" — all shares are equal, so result is same  
**Action taken:** KEPT — ignored split_details, applied equal split

## Final Import Result

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| Clean rows imported | 23 |
| Flagged rows — KEPT as-is | 4 |
| Flagged rows — MODIFIED and imported | 9 |
| Flagged rows — SKIPPED | 3 |
| Converted to Settlements | 2 |
| **Total imported to database** | **36** |
| **Total skipped** | **3** |

**Net balance impact of corrections:**
- Removing Row 6 duplicate prevented ₹3,200 from being double-counted
- Removing Row 25 duplicate prevented ₹2,450 from inflating Rohan's paid amount
- Normalising Pizza Friday percentages corrected a ₹144 overcharge
- Removing Meera from April groceries corrected a post-departure attribution error
- Treating two settlement rows as settlements prevents ~₹20,000 from appearing as shared expenses
